body:
🚨🚨🚨 **HOW TO GET THIS UPDATE (v3.06)** 🚨🚨🚨

Always use the same download link from your original Gumroad email. Open that email and click the same link — it will automatically download the latest version (3.06).

→ You NEVER need to purchase again to receive updates.

## 🎉 Stable Release 3.06

## ✨ What's New

### 🛠 Fixes

- **Fixed a bug that generated duplicate entries in the Menu Builder plugin.**

### 📘 Documentation Update

- **Added the Master Prompt in manual.html to generate User Plugins for EasyPyDesktop.**

---

🚨🚨🚨 **HOW TO GET THIS UPDATE (v3.05)** 🚨🚨🚨

Always use the same download link from your original Gumroad email. Open that email and click the same link — it will automatically download the latest version (3.05).

→ You NEVER need to purchase again to receive updates.

## 🎉 Stable Release 3.05

## ✨ What's New

### ✨ New Features

- **Conditional Math Logic Wizard:**
  - Build complex interactive logic with zero code.
  - Evaluate a widget’s value and perform math operations on a persistent variable.
  - Perfect for counters, score systems, dynamic calculations, and state-based interactions.

- **Array / List Manager (In-Memory):**
  - Create and manage arrays/lists stored in memory.
  - Add, remove, update, and retrieve values dynamically.
  - Designed for advanced state management without writing code.

### 📂 New Demo Included

- **demo_new_logic_command.json:** Demonstrates both the Conditional Math wizard and the Array/List Manager in action.

---

🚨🚨🚨 **HOW TO GET THIS UPDATE (v3.04)** 🚨🚨🚨

Always use the same download link from your original Gumroad email. Open that email and click the same link — it will automatically download the latest version (3.04).

→ You NEVER need to purchase again to receive updates.

## 🎉 Stable Release 3.04

## ✨ What's New

### 🎬 New FFmpeg Plugin

- **Brand new FFmpeg plugin included.**
- **26 built-in FFmpeg commands available.**

### 🧩 Improvements

- **Added new Wizard commands.**
- **Bugs fixed.**
- **New demos added.**

---

### Previous Version — 3.03

## 🎉 Stable Release 3.03

## ✨ What's New

### 🎬 FFmpeg Multimedia Updates

- **New multimedia commands for FFmpeg.**
- **New demo project:** demo_ffmpeg_editor.json
- **Minor bugs fixed.**

### 🧩 Property Panel — New Enhancements

#### Fixed Controls (Always Visible in Appearance Section)

- **Enabled:** Toggle to set the widget’s initial enabled/disabled state.
- **Opacity:** 0–100% spinbox using real QGraphicsOpacityEffect.
- **Tooltip:** Help text displayed on hover.

#### Improved Text & Font Section

- **Bold / Italic:** Quick toggle checkboxes (no font dialog needed).
- **Font Size:** Direct size spinbox in the panel.
- **Letter Spacing:** Character spacing in pixels.
- **Alignment:** Now supported for Button, Label, Input, TextArea, CheckBox, and RadioButton.
- **Word Wrap:** Available for Label and TextArea.

#### Widget-Specific Properties

- **Input Fields:** Placeholder text, Read Only, Password Mode, Max Length.
- **Button:** Checkable (toggle), Initially Checked, Flat style.
- **Label:** Open External Links.
- **CheckBox / RadioButton:** Initially Checked.
- **Timer:** Interval (ms), Single Shot.
- **ProgressBar:** Show % Text, Custom Format (%p%, %v/%m).
- **Slider:** Tick Marks (position), Tick Interval.
- **ComboBox:** Editable mode.
- **ListBox:** Multi-select.
- **TableWidget:** Show Grid, Sortable.
- **TextArea:** Tab Width (characters).
- **SpinBox / DoubleSpinBox:** Wrap Around.

---

### Previous Version — 3.00

## 🎉 Stable Release 3.00

## ✨ What's New

### 🧩 Editor Improvements

- **Select All Widgets (Page Option):** New option to quickly select all widgets on the current page for faster editing and bulk operations.

### 🖥 System Tray Support

- **System Tray Icon Demo:** Added a new demo project showcasing how to use the system tray icon functionality in desktop applications.

### 🎨 Style Manager Enhancements

- **More Built-in Themes:** Added additional themes to the Style Manager plugin for improved UI customization.

### 🪟 New Plugin: Dialog Builder

- **Dialog Builder Plugin:** New visual tool to easily create and manage custom dialogs.
- **Dialog Builder Demo:** Included a dedicated demo project demonstrating how to build and use dialogs.

### 🛠 Smarter Error Detection

- **Improved Intelligent Error Detection:** Enhanced detection for common mistakes in Global Code and widget events.
- The system now attempts to predict frequent errors and provide clearer, more helpful feedback directly to the user.

---

### Previous Version — 2.99

## 🎉 Stable Early Access Release 2.99

## ✨ What's New

### 🛠 Improved Error Reporting (F5 Preview)

- **Runtime Errors Improved:** Runtime errors in F5 Preview now show the exact line in your code (Global Code or widget event) instead of a raw _f5_preview.py line number.
- **Canvas Configuration Errors:** Errors such as wrong widget type or incompatible initial values are now clearly identified by widget ID, including a direct hint to fix them directly in the canvas.

### 📊 Table Widget Improvements

- **10 New Commands for Table Widget:** Expanded functionality with ten new built-in commands to provide more control and flexibility when working with tables.
- **New Table Widget Demo:** Added a dedicated demo project showcasing the new Table Widget capabilities.
- **New Demo:** demo_demo_dashboard.json – Example dashboard project demonstrating advanced layout and table integration.

---

(remaining previous versions unchanged)
